audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission ($9.50) per person which allows access to the Discovery Museum, as well as Discovery Woods. Any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price of $19. This is a virtual pass that does not need to be picked up at the Lib
